summary: End-to-end testing of Coremore single-page consultancy MVP — backend API (pytest, 7/7 passing) and frontend (Playwright). All requested flows work: hero/expertise/methodology/founders/mid-cta/contact/footer rendering, smooth-scroll navigation, contact form validation (required, email, message length), successful submission with reference ID success state, 'Send another brief' reset, mobile menu toggle, and MongoDB persistence with no _id leak.

minor.issue: Inside the except block `logger.exception(...)` is used, but the `logger` module variable is defined AFTER the route at line 125. It works only because routes execute lazily, but logger initialization should be moved to top-of-file (right after `import logging`) for clarity and to avoid surprises if logging is needed during import-time errors.

action_items: (Optional, low priority) Move `logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)` and logging.basicConfig to the top of /app/backend/server.py so it is initialized before the route closures reference it.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger defined after routes that use it (works at runtime but bad practice).
GET /api/contact has no pagination cursor (only `limit` query param) — acceptable for MVP.
All Mongo reads correctly project out `_id` (verified).
Frontend correctly uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL; no hardcoded URLs found in components.
seed_data_creation: Created a few TEST_-prefixed contact submissions and one status check via the API for verification. They remain in MongoDB; not cleaned up because there are no DELETE endpoints — non-critical.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_coremore_api.py. Run with `pytest backend/tests/test_coremore_api.py -v`. Frontend external URL https://coremore-test.preview.emergentagent.com. Mid CTA text is split across two lines ("Let's Create" / "Value Together.") — match with partial text if asserting. Mobile menu toggle has data-testid='nav-mobile-toggle'.
verified_features: POST /api/contact 422 on invalid email, missing fields, message<5 chars
GET /api/contact returns list desc-ordered by submitted_at, no _id leak
All sections render (hero, expertise 4 cards, methodology, 3 founders, mid-cta, contact form, footer)
Form HTML5 validation rejects invalid email
Successful submit shows BRIEF RECEIVED + ref ID + 'Send another brief' resets form
Zero JS console errors during full flow
